steps.name: Prepare team via backend (owner + members + conversation)
Enable conference calling & start browser instances for participants
Login as team owner in Android app
Prepare participants to auto-accept next incoming call
Start group call from GroupCallChats conversation
Verify group call is active and participants joined
Unmute participants and verify audio is sent & received
Participant sends a message to the group conversation
Verify message is visible in conversation
Share QR code file in conversation and verify it is sent
